text:
There once was a bird named Bob. Bob liked to sing all day. Birds always do. So, Bob sang! Bob sang for everything. Even when he was tired. Bob liked to sing that song about a girl named Sally. You know the one.

It wasn't just Bob that liked that song. Everybody liked it. People liked it so much they made Sally famous. And now all the people liked that song.

Oh sure, other songs were wonderful too. Like the song about a turtle. But that one wasn't famous. Nobody sang it.

So Bob sang his Sally song every day. People liked that even more. They loved it!

And Bob got famous. He got famous because people loved his song about Sally.

Now everybody knows that song. People sing it even now.

So that's kind of how fame went for Bob. Just lots of singing.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
